user.title: Smart Presence Notify — General Settings
user.description: Smart Presence Notify sends notifications only when someone is home. If the house is empty, incoming messages are held and delivered when someone arrives. Configure who gets notified and how held messages are managed.

data.name: Display name
data.target_mode: Who gets notified when someone is home?
data.queue_mode: When someone arrives home, which held messages to send?
data.queue_timeout_minutes: Hold messages for up to (minutes, 0 = indefinitely)
data.fallback_mode: What to do with expired messages?
data.fallback_service: Forward expired messages to this service

data_description.name: The name shown in Home Assistant's Devices & Services page.
data_description.target_mode:
Choose who receives each notification while someone is home:
- **Everyone home** — all household members currently at home.
- **Admin person only** — only the designated admin; if away, the first person to arrive home gets it.
- **Specified in service call** — your automation or script sets the recipient each time.
data_description.queue_mode:
Applies only when the house was empty and messages were held:
- **All messages, oldest first** — every held message is delivered in arrival order.
- **Most recent message only** — only the last message is sent; older ones are discarded.
- **Summary** — a single message listing the titles of all held messages.
data_description.queue_timeout_minutes: After this many minutes, held messages are considered expired and handled according to the rule below. Set to **0** to hold them indefinitely until someone comes home.
data_description.fallback_mode:
What happens when a held message expires:
- **Discard silently** — the message is deleted with no notification.
- **Forward to another service** — the message is sent to the service specified below (e.g. a Telegram bot or email), even if nobody is home.
data_description.fallback_service: The notify service that receives expired messages (e.g. `notify.telegram`). Required only when 'Forward to another service' is selected above.

persons.title: Who to notify — Service mapping
persons.description:
For each person tracked in Home Assistant, choose which notification service to use. The **first service** in the list is the primary one.

Leave a person without a service to exclude them from Smart Presence Notify.

data_description.admin_person: The household member who always receives notifications in 'Admin person only' mode. If this person is away, the first person who arrives home gets the notification instead.

error.invalid_timeout: Timeout must be 0 (disabled) or a positive number of minutes.
error.fallback_service_required: You must specify a notify service when 'Forward to another service' is selected.
error.no_persons: At least one person must have a notify service assigned.
error.admin_required: You must select an admin person when 'Admin person only' mode is active.

abort.already_configured: Smart Presence Notify is already set up. Use the Configure button to change settings.
